# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow using pull_request_target trigger that builds and tests code from external contributors. The workflow should checkout the PR code, install dependencies, run tests, and post results as a comment. This enables automated testing of community contributions.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Community Contribution CI

on:
  pull_request_target:
    types: [opened, synchronize, reopened]

permissions:
  contents: read
  pull-requests: write
  issues: write

jobs:
  build-and-test:
    name: Build and Test PR
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout base repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Checkout PR code safely
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          ref: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }}
          path: pr-code
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          cache: 'npm'
          cache-dependency-path: pr-code/package-lock.json

      - name: Install dependencies
        id: install
        working-directory: pr-code
        run: |
          echo "::group::Installing dependencies"
          npm ci 2>&1 | tee install-output.txt
          echo "::endgroup::"
          echo "install_status=success" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Run linting
        id: lint
        if: steps.install.outputs.install_status == 'success'
        working-directory: pr-code
        run: |
          echo "::group::Running linter"
          npm run lint 2>&1 | tee lint-output.txt
          echo "::endgroup::"
          echo "lint_status=success" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Run build
        id: build
        if: steps.install.outputs.install_status == 'success'
        working-directory: pr-code
        run: |
          echo "::group::Building project"
          npm run build 2>&1 | tee build-output.txt
          echo "::endgroup::"
          echo "build_status=success" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Run tests
        id: tests
        if: steps.install.outputs.install_status == 'success'
        working-directory: pr-code
        run: |
          echo "::group::Running tests"
          npm test 2>&1 | tee test-output.txt
          echo "::endgroup::"
          echo "test_status=success" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Collect test results
        id: results
        if: always()
        run: |
          INSTALL_STATUS="${{ steps.install.outputs.install_status }}"
          LINT_STATUS="${{ steps.lint.outputs.lint_status }}"
          BUILD_STATUS="${{ steps.build.outputs.build_status }}"
          TEST_STATUS="${{ steps.tests.outputs.test_status }}"

          INSTALL_ICON=$([[ "$INSTALL_STATUS" == "success" ]] && echo "✅" || echo "❌")
          LINT_ICON=$([[ "$LINT_STATUS" == "success" ]] && echo "✅" || echo "❌")
          BUILD_ICON=$([[ "$BUILD_STATUS" == "success" ]] && echo "✅" || echo "❌")
          TEST_ICON=$([[ "$TEST_STATUS" == "success" ]] && echo "✅" || echo "❌")

          if [[ "$INSTALL_STATUS" != "success" ]]; then
            LINT_ICON="⏭️"
            BUILD_ICON="⏭️"
            TEST_ICON="⏭️"
          fi

          OVERALL="success"
          if [[ "$INSTALL_STATUS" != "success" || "$LINT_STATUS" != "success" || "$BUILD_STATUS" != "success" || "$TEST_STATUS" != "success" ]]; then
            OVERALL="failure"
          fi

          # Collect error logs if any step failed
          ERROR_DETAILS=""
          if [[ "$INSTALL_STATUS" != "success" && -f pr-code/install-output.txt ]]; then
            INSTALL_LOG=$(tail -20 pr-code/install-output.txt)
            ERROR_DETAILS="${ERROR_DETAILS}\n<details>\n<summary>Install Output (last 20 lines)</summary>\n\n\`\`\`\n${INSTALL_LOG}\n\`\`\`\n</details>\n"
          fi
          if [[ "$LINT_STATUS" != "success" && -f pr-code/lint-output.txt ]]; then
            LINT_LOG=$(tail -30 pr-code/lint-output.txt)
            ERROR_DETAILS="${ERROR_DETAILS}\n<details>\n<summary>Lint Output (last 30 lines)</summary>\n\n\`\`\`\n${LINT_LOG}\n\`\`\`\n</details>\n"
          fi
          if [[ "$BUILD_STATUS" != "success" && -f pr-code/build-output.txt ]]; then
            BUILD_LOG=$(tail -30 pr-code/build-output.txt)
            ERROR_DETAILS="${ERROR_DETAILS}\n<details>\n<summary>Build Output (last 30 lines)</summary>\n\n\`\`\`\n${BUILD_LOG}\n\`\`\`\n</details>\n"
          fi
          if [[ "$TEST_STATUS" != "success" && -f pr-code/test-output.txt ]]; then
            TEST_LOG=$(tail -50 pr-code/test-output.txt)
            ERROR_DETAILS="${ERROR_DETAILS}\n<details>\n<summary>Test Output (last 50 lines)</summary>\n\n\`\`\`\n${TEST_LOG}\n\`\`\`\n</details>\n"
          fi

          {
            echo "install_icon=${INSTALL_ICON}"
            echo "lint_icon=${LINT_ICON}"
            echo "build_icon=${BUILD_ICON}"
            echo "test_icon=${TEST_ICON}"
            echo "overall=${OVERALL}"
          } >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

          # Use a delimiter for multiline output
          EOF=$(dd if=/dev/urandom bs=15 count=1 status=none | base64)
          echo "error_details<<${EOF}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo -e "${ERROR_DETAILS}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "${EOF}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

      - name: Find existing bot comment
        id: find_comment
        if: always()
        uses: peter-evans/find-comment@v3
        with:
          issue-number: ${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}
          comment-author: 'github-actions[bot]'
          body-includes: '## 🤖 Community Contribution CI Results'

      - name: Post or update PR comment with results
        if: always()
        uses: peter-evans/create-or-update-comment@v4
        with:
          comment-id: ${{ steps.find_comment.outputs.comment-id }}
          issue-number: ${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}
          edit-mode: replace
          body: |
            ## 🤖 Community Contribution CI Results

            Thank you for your contribution! Here are the automated test results for commit `${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }}`:

            | Step | Status |
            |------|--------|
            | **Install Dependencies** | ${{ steps.results.outputs.install_icon }} |
            | **Lint** | ${{ steps.results.outputs.lint_icon }} |
            | **Build** | ${{ steps.results.outputs.build_icon }} |
            | **Tests** | ${{ steps.results.outputs.test_icon }} |

            **Overall Result:** ${{ steps.results.outputs.overall == 'success' && '🎉 All checks passed!' || '⚠️ Some checks failed. Please review the details below.' }}

            ${{ steps.results.outputs.error_details }}

            ---
            > 📝 **Legend:** ✅ Passed | ❌ Failed | ⏭️ Skipped
            >
            > 🔗 [View full workflow run](https://github.com/${{ github.repository }}/actions/runs/${{ github.run_id }})
            >
            > *This comment is automatically updated on each push to this PR.*

      - name: Set final status
        if: always()
        run: |
          if [[ "${{ steps.results.outputs.overall }}" != "success" ]]; then
            echo "::error::One or more CI steps failed for this contribution"
            exit 1
          fi
